messages.message: Buenos dias mijo. Did you eat? You sound tired on Sundays.
Morning Ma. I ate. Big event signing this week, the Rodriguez Quinceanera is official.
Nice one hermano. Mom is good, took her to the pharmacy yesterday.
Carlos drives like a maniac but he is a good son. Both of you are.
Dad do not forget your back stretches. I saw you wince loading the van.
Listen to your daughter. When are you all coming to visit?
Working on it Ma. Maybe the trip we always talk about. I am putting it on paper this time.
